history.content:
<thought>
I am at row 02 column B facing right (`>`). The cell directly in front of me, row 02 column C, is lava (`L`), so I cannot move forward. The safe path toward the goal at row 08 column H is to go downward along column B first, so I need to turn clockwise to face down.
</thought>
<action>
GIRA_HORARIO
</action>

<thought>
I am now at row 02 column B facing down (`v`). The cell in front, row 03 column B, is safe (`.`), so I should advance straight down along the left corridor toward the bottom and then toward the goal.
</thought>
<action>
FRENTE
</action>

<thought>
I am at row 03 column B facing down (`v`). The cell ahead, row 04 column B, is safe (`.`), so I should keep moving forward down the corridor.
</thought>
<action>
FRENTE
</action>

<thought>
I am at row 04 column B facing down. The cell ahead, row 05 column B, is safe, so continuing forward is the best move to keep descending toward the open path near the goal.
</thought>
<action>
FRENTE
</action>

<thought>
I am at row 05 column B facing down. The cell ahead, row 06 column B, is safe, and I should keep moving down the left corridor until I can head right toward the goal.
</thought>
<action>
FRENTE
</action>

<thought>
I am at row 06 column B facing down. The cell ahead, row 07 column B, is safe, so I should move forward one more step to reach the lower passage.
</thought>
<action>
FRENTE
</action>

<thought>
I am at row 07 column B facing down, and the cell ahead at row 08 column B is safe. Moving forward takes me into the bottom open area, closer to the goal on the right.
</thought>
<action>
FRENTE
</action>

<thought>
I am at row 08 column B facing down. The goal is on the same row at column H, so I should turn left from down to face right before moving across the safe corridor.
</thought>
<action>
GIRA_ANTI_HORARIO
</action>

<thought>
I am at row 08 column B facing right. The path to the goal is clear along row 08, so I should move forward toward the goal.
</thought>
<action>
FRENTE
</action>

<thought>
I am at row 08 column C facing right. The cells ahead toward the goal are safe, and the goal is farther to the right, so I should continue forward.
</thought>
<action>
FRENTE
</action>

<thought>
I am at row 08 column D facing right. The goal is still to the right and the path on this row remains clear, so I should keep moving forward.
</thought>
<action>
FRENTE
</action>

<thought>
I am at row 08 column E facing right. The goal is still ahead on the same row, and the route remains safe, so I should move forward.
</thought>
<action>
FRENTE
</action>

<thought>
I am at row 08 column F facing right. The goal is directly ahead at row 08 column H, and the cell in front is safe, so I should keep advancing.
</thought>
<action>
FRENTE
</action>

<thought>
I am at row 08 column G facing right. The goal is immediately ahead at row 08 column H, so I should move forward to reach it.
</thought>
<action>
FRENTE
